original_statement: which town has the top remaining population to this date?
mutated_statement: which locality must simultaneously have the top and the lowest remaining population to this date?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Modal/necessity addition] + [Comparative addition & conjunction] + [Logical contradiction introduced]: "town" generalized to "locality" | adds necessity/simultaneity ("has" → "must simultaneously have") | adds "lowest" and conjunction ("top ... population" → "top and the lowest ... population") | introduces an impossible/contradictory requirement (top → top and lowest). (town → locality | has → must simultaneously have | top remaining population → top and the lowest remaining population)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：judge_thought 明确列出“最高为 Ulysses（估计5557）和最低为 Freeport（估计7）”，且标注结果为“[Correct]”，但未提及“必须同时为最高与最低”这一自相矛盾点；（2）agent具体表现：直接执行查询并返回“Ulysses|Freeport”，按可行子集（分别找出最高与最低）完成任务，未对“must simultaneously”或逻辑矛盾提出质疑、澄清或拒绝，也未采用折衷或修正策略；（3）归类理由：该行为符合“无视所有矛盾指令”定义——代理没有识别或处理指令内部的不可能性，只基于可行的子集继续执行并输出结果，既未修正也未合理化矛盾。
